[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1110011100 6
1 0111100101 6
2 0001001101 4
3 0110100101 5
4 0000000000 a
5 0000000000 a
6 1101100010 5
7 1111111010 8

01 10 1111111010 8 match 7
12 21 1111111010 8 match 7
23 32 0101110010 5
34 43 1111111110 9
45 54 1111111101 9
56 65 0111101101 7
67 76 0111101101 7
70 07 1111100111 8

13 31 1111111010 8 match 7
24 42 1110011100 6 match 0
35 53 0111110111 8
46 64 1111011101 8
57 75 0111100101 6 match 1
60 06 1101101111 8
71 17 1111111111 a

36 63 0001111111 7
47 74 1110111101 8
50 05 1111100111 8

37 73 0111110111 8
